sections.label: Lyrics
lines: [Verse 1]
My soul wakes like morning light
Through the quiet of ordinary things
Not the thunder of crowns or armies
But the whisper the humble hear
I have seen the towers of power
Polished bright with pride and fear
But heaven bends toward the smallest voice
That dares to say You’re near
The world counts strength in iron hands
In victories carved in stone
But the One who shaped the galaxies
Finds glory in the unknown
[Pre-Chorus]
The proud build ladders to the sky
But mercy kneels beside the ground
The empty heart that reaches upward
Is where the greatest grace is found
[Chorus]
He lifts the lowly from the dust
And fills the empty hands with bread
The proud may stand on golden thrones
But love remembers what they said
He turns the kingdoms upside down
Where mercy writes a different story
The humble rise, the mighty fall
And quiet hearts inherit glory
[Verse 2]
I’ve watched the hungry search the night
For a promise stronger than despair
Heaven answered not with thunder
But with hope already there
Not in the palace halls of power
Not where the wealthy voices sing
But in the prayer of trembling people
Who trust a hidden King
History bends in silent ways
The rulers never understand
A kingdom grows from seeds of mercy
Planted in surrendered hands
[Pre-Chorus]
The proud believe the world is theirs
But time will wash their names away
The ones who walk in quiet faith
Will see a brighter day
[Chorus]
He lifts the lowly from the dust
And fills the empty hands with bread
The proud may stand on golden thrones
But love remembers what they said
He turns the kingdoms upside down
Where mercy writes a different story
The humble rise, the mighty fall
And quiet hearts inherit glory
[Bridge]
Blessed are the souls who tremble
Not from fear but holy awe
They know the strength of heaven’s kindness
Is deeper than the strongest law
Through every age the promise echoes
Like a river through the years
The God who sees the hidden sorrow
Is the One who dries our tears
[Final Chorus]
He lifts the lowly from the dust
And fills the empty hands with light
The proud may shine for just a moment
But mercy holds the endless night
He turns the kingdoms upside down
Where love becomes the final story
The humble rise, the mighty fall
And quiet hearts inherit glory
[Outro]
My soul sings softly in the morning
Of a kingdom few can see
Where the smallest act of surrender
Is the truest victory
